scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern (temp_model, deploy, wait with all_active) is correct, but the response incorrectly states that jubilant.all_active checks both active workload status AND idle agent status. The gold standard explicitly shows these are separate: all_active (workload) and all_agents_idle (agent) must be combined via lambda for active+idle.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: claims all_active checks active AND idle when it only checks workload active status. Also introduces unit.is_active, unit.is_blocked, unit.workload_status.message, and unit.address attributes that are not in the gold standard and may not exist in the jubilant API.
